subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! The All-Glorious hath turned toward thee from this Prison and hath made mention of thee with that which hath set ablaze the hearts of them that are near [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل قد اقبل الیک الجلیل من هذا السجن و ذکرک بما اشتعلت به افئده المقربین
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @presence of; reunion with God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
